entries.definition:
r–f–r–f to flutter, to flap wings, to shiver; flaps, frills, sheer material; tent, the flaps of a tent, pillows, carpets, fine furnishings; to glitter; to favour with gifts, provisions, a flock of sheep. Of this root, رَفْرَف rafraf occurs once in the Qur’an.
رَفْرَف rafraf [pl. of n. رَفْرَفَة rafrafatun] variously interpreted as meadows, soft furnishings or cushions (55:76) مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ they will be reclining on green cushions and fine carpets.

r–f–r–f to flutter, to flap wings, to shiver; flaps, frills, sheer material; tent, the flaps of a tent, pillows, carpets, fine furnishings; to glitter; to favour with gifts, provisions, a flock of sheep. Of this root, رَفْرَف rafraf occurs once in the Qur’an.
رَفْرَف rafraf [pl. of n. رَفْرَفَة rafrafatun] variously interpreted as meadows, soft furnishings or cushions (55:76) مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ they will be reclining on green cushions and fine carpets.
